debug_info.goal:
k : ℕ
hk : 0 < k
S : Finset ℕ
hS : ∀ p ∈ S, Odd p ∧ Nat.Prime p
p₁ p₂ : Fin S.card ≃ ↥S
hp₁ : IMO2022P3.Condition k S p₁
hp₂ : IMO2022P3.Condition k S p₂
⊢ (∃ i, ∀ (j : Fin S.card), p₂ j = p₁ (j + i)) ∨ ∃ i, ∀ (j : Fin S.card), p₂ j = p₁ (j.rev + i)

failed_attempts:
haveI : NeZero #S := ⟨(Finset.card_pos.mpr hSne).ne'⟩
  by_cases hcard : #S ≤ 2
  · -- Easy case: |S| ≤ 2. Any two bijections differ by rotation.
    exact Or.inl (rotation_of_small_card hcard p₁ p₂)
  · -- Hard case: |S| ≥ 3. Use edge_preservation + cycle_automorphism.
    push_neg at hcard
    set σ := p₂.trans p₁.symm with hσ
    have hedge : ∀ i : Fin #S, σ (i + 1) = σ i + 1 ∨ σ (i + 1) = σ i - 1 :=
      edge_preservation hk S hS (by omega) hp₁ hp₂
    rcases cycle_automorphism (by omega : 3 ≤ #S) σ hedge with ⟨c, hc⟩ | ⟨c, hc⟩
    · left
      exact ⟨c, fun j => by
        have : p₂ j = p₁ (σ j) := by simp [hσ]
        rw [this, hc j]⟩
    · right
      exact ⟨c, fun j => by
        have : p₂ j = p₁ (σ j) := by simp [hσ]
        rw [this, hc j]⟩
